_method: All addresses + ACTIVITY verified via eth_getCode + eth_getLogs against rpc.pharos.xyz (chain 1672) and atlantic.dplabs-internal.com (chain 688689).
_rpc_note: Pharos RPC has a 1000-block limit on eth_getLogs. To enumerate events, chunk queries into 1000-block windows or use the Pharos block explorer.

r25_axil.name: R25 — Axil Consumer Credit Vaults
r25_axil._verified: Both vaults 1115 bytes (ERC-4626 proxy). VRPCW totalAssets = $847,884 USDC (LIVE TVL).
r25_axil._executability: ✅ FULLY EXECUTABLE — pure ERC-4626, all standard calls work
r25_axil.apy_method: Snapshot previewRedeem(1e18) at two times. apy = (pps_now/pps_then)^(365/days) - 1

zona.name: Zona — RWA Lending (Aave V3 fork)
zona._verified: Pool proxy 2333 bytes. getReserveData(USDC) returns full Aave V3 tuple with non-zero liquidity rate.
zona._executability: ✅ FULLY EXECUTABLE — Aave V3 standard ABI applies
zona.apy_method: Tuple field at index 3 (currentLiquidityRate, uint128, RAY 1e27). apy = (1 + rate/1e27/SECS_PER_YEAR)^SECS_PER_YEAR - 1, where SECS_PER_YEAR = 31536000.

faroswap.name: Faroswap — DEX (DODO fork)
faroswap._executability: 🟡 PARTIAL — swap quotes work via DODO route API; on-chain LP APY requires pool discovery
faroswap._note: For yield computation, fetch pool list from DODO route service; APY = (fees_24h × 365 / pool_tvl) × 100

morpho.name: Morpho Blue (Pharos)
morpho._verified: 15582 bytes deployed at 0x18573fA18fd17dDfD790B4a5B5b2977aad3b4Efb. As of 2026-06-13, NO CreateMarket events have fired — no active markets.
morpho._executability: ❌ NOT_USABLE_YET — no markets to read from
morpho._critical_note: Pharos uses DISTINCT Morpho address — NOT canonical 0xBBBB...FFCb
morpho._when_active: When markets exist, read via market(bytes32 id) and IRM borrowRateView; agent must enumerate via CreateMarket events (1000-block chunks) or query app.morpho.org for marketIds.

termmax.name: TermMax (Term Structure) — Fixed Rate Lending
termmax._verified: FactoryV2 deployed. As of 2026-06-13, NO factory events — no vaults/markets created yet.
termmax._executability: ❌ NOT_USABLE_YET — no vaults to read from
termmax._when_active: When vaults are created, use TermMaxViewer.getVaultInfo(vault) → returns VaultInfo struct including .apr field directly. Or call vault.apr() (uint256) directly per ITermMaxVault.

aquaflux.name: AquaFlux — RWA Structured Yield (tri-token)
aquaflux._verified: Proxy at 0x0da9...127, implementation at 0x3a36d537b37f96d3df22e808400b781286200fb3 (170-byte proxy stub)
aquaflux._executability: ❌ ABI_GAP — view functions for APY/positions not in public docs
aquaflux._critical_note: Per AquaFlux docs: APY per tranche has NO documented on-chain getter. Yield depends on coupon share + protocol fee + rewards - expected loss (waterfall mechanism).
aquaflux._workaround: Read implementation bytecode and decompile, OR use docs.aquaflux.pro app data, OR contact team. Currently report tri-token addresses to user and direct them to app for APY.

native_pros_staking.name: Native PROS Staking
native_pros_staking._executability: 🟡 PARTIAL — precompile not at standard slots (0x1000, 0x1001, 0x0800 all empty). Need Pharos staking docs for exact address.
native_pros_staking._note: Native L1 staking via Pharos validator delegation. APY not readable on-chain via standard pattern. Direct user to Pharos validator UI for actual staking until precompile location is published.

faroo_liquid_staking.name: Faroo Liquid Staking (stPROS)
faroo_liquid_staking._note: Mainnet config in live app shows 1672:{} (empty). UI shows 'Coming Soon'. Testnet stPROS at 0xc9A0B63... is functional. Skip mainnet entry until live.

atlantic-testnet._note: Only Faroo has live testnet contract.

_summary_for_agents.agent_guidance: When user asks 'best yield on Pharos', the agent should scan the fully_executable_now list, present those with live APYs, and for others, mention status: 'protocol is deployed but not yet active' or 'requires team-published ABI'.
